steps.instruction: Gather your materials: pot, water, and stove.
Fill the pot with water, ensuring not to overfill.
Place the pot on the stove and turn on the heat to high.
While waiting for the water to boil, ensure you are standing safely away from the stove.
Once the water reaches a rolling boil, carefully add your ingredients (if applicable).
Turn off the stove after use and allow the pot to cool before handling.

safety_tips: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pots.
Keep flammable materials away from the stove.
